title: PMS 5.5" x 5.75" ROUND CASTLE BUCKET W/SPADE + HANGTAG
features: Create spectacular sandcastles, 3 assorted colours with 1 sent at random.
Build your very own castle empire using this round castle bucket & spade.
description: A brilliant bucket in the shape of a castle, and a spade - perfect for making sandcastles at the beach. Sure to provide hours of fun at the beach or in the garden. Product Information: Round Castle Bucket Spade attached Assorted colours Measures: 14.5cm Please note - Colours and designs may vary, only one supplied.
